demo.title: litcoin-mine.py
demo.code:
from litcoin import Agent

# pip install litcoin
agent = Agent(bankr_key="bk_YOUR_KEY")

# One-time faucet — 5M LITCOIN to get started
agent.faucet()

# Comprehension mining (no LLM needed)
agent.mine(rounds=10)
agent.claim()

# Research mining (LLM generates + tests code, submits if it beats baseline)
agent = Agent(
    bankr_key="bk_YOUR_KEY",
    ai_key="bk_YOUR_KEY",           # Bankr LLM key doubles as AI key
    ai_url="https://llm.bankr.bot/v1",
)
result = agent.research_mine()

# Iterate on a specific task for maximum rewards
agent.research_loop(task_id="sort-benchmark-001", rounds=50, delay=30)

setup: Get Bankr API key at bankr.bot/api (enable write access)
